data.body:
Scope expansion (2026-04-26, from docs/proposed-mitigations-4-26.md):

Three additional mitigations absorbed into this epic's CI/local parity scope:

- **G1-M3** — Hermetic CI smoke job: extend portability-smoke.yml (or add hermetic-smoke.yml) to run validate.sh --ci with unset CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, fresh HOME, minimal PATH on every PR. Exercises the validate.sh fallback code path that today is never hit in CI.
- **G9-M1** — Hermetic env: block in all CI workflows that invoke dso scripts; add tools/lint-workflows.sh asserting every dso-invoking workflow declares the block.
- **G9-M2** — validate.sh --ci internally unsets CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (and other inheritable session vars) before delegating to runners, making local --ci behaviorally equivalent to hermetic CI.

Rationale: this epic's existing SC focuses on shellcheck/ruff scope parity via config keys (commands.shellcheck, commands.ruff_plugin). The additions extend the parity dimension to environment hermeticity — same problem class (local passes, CI fails) different mechanism (env state vs check coverage). All three additions respect the constraint in the existing comment that validate.sh remain platform-agnostic; G9-M1/M2 changes are env-block additions and unset declarations, not new tool invocations.

Children may need re-decomposition once SCs are amended.
